kept.text:
Needham Reiterates Buy Rating on $JOBY, PT $18

Analyst comments: "We reiterate our Buy rating and $18 target after attending JOBY's kick-off event in New York City showcasing its S4 eVTOL aircraft and its real-world capabilities, flying the aircraft from JFK Airport to Blade's West Side hub, further cementing air taxi travel as a when, not an if, proposition.

Beyond public eVTOL aircraft demonstrations, JOBY continues to widen its industry leadership gap versus air taxi-focused peers in terms of technical achievements and partnerships, with JOBY now the first to fly hybrid VTOL aircraft and partnering with a global luxury property developer to create a blueprint for a new and likely sought-after amenity: private access to air taxi operations. 

Our $18 price target is 15x our 2031 estimated adjusted EBITDA discounted back, balancing consistent execution and near-term catalysts against longer-dated estimates."

Analyst: Chris Pierce

author.name: Wall St Engine
author.description: Fast, accurate, consistent stock market news, earnings highlights & more. By Brillinsight. Not financial advice.

kept.text:
Want to know what @joeben just said at the @NYSE? It was a special $JOBY moment!

Good morning to everyone here in the room and everyone joining us online.
And thank you to the New York Stock Exchange for welcoming us here today - it’s great to be back in New York City.

It’s been just about five years since we were last in this building, celebrating our listing on the Stock Exchange.

The night before we listed there was a huge thunderstorm, and our incredible Joby team worked through the night - and the rain - to build a Joby aircraft outside this building and show the world what we are here to do.

Our team has continued to work with the same grit and determination every day since then but today, there are only clear skies. And our aircraft isn’t being built outside. It’s being charged at JFK, ready for its flight to the Wall Street heliport, later this morning.

That’s an incredible validation of what we’ve been able to achieve as a team and I couldn’t be more grateful to each and every one of you for continuing to demonstrate why we’re the leaders in our industry.
2026 is going to be a very special year for Joby.

We’re scaling manufacturing in California and Ohio. We’ve begun the final stage of the type certification process. And we’re getting ready for early passenger operations.

A few weeks ago we began our Electric Skies Tour by flying past the Golden Gate Bridge. Today, we’ll be flying in New York. 

And through the course of America’s 250th year, we’re going to be flying in states across America, as part of a White House-backed program.

Instead of just reading about the future of flight, communities across America are going to be able to look up at the skies above their own cities, and see it for themselves.

The next golden age of flight begins today, and I couldn’t be more proud to be here - with you all - ringing it in. Let’s go!

author.name: Tut C🅰️pital
author.description: Critical and sarcastic thinker. Graduate from the school of life. Always learning. Never financial or investment advice.

quoted_tweet.text:
$JOBY: Almost no one outside of fintwit or the investing bubble has any real idea what’s coming with eVTOL (flying cars).

It’s actually wild.

I was in Dubai and met a group of ~10 people who live there, in a city where three vertiports are literally under construction and commercial launch is slated for next year, and not a single one of them had ever heard of Joby. Not one. Same story across almost my entire friend group in the U.S. Smart people. Plugged in. Zero awareness.

This feels exactly like early ChatGPT.
Everyone thinks “this is niche,” “this is far off,” “I’ll pay attention later.” Meanwhile, the infrastructure is being built, regulators are aligned, aircrafts are certified, and launch partners are locked in.

Adoption doesn’t happen linearly.
It happens slowly… then suddenly… then all at once.

Next year the floodgates start opening in the U.S., UAE, and Japan. Once people see these things flying daily, the narrative flips overnight. Media scrambles. Retail wakes up. Institutions chase.

By the time it’s obvious, it won’t be cheap. And Joby will be the only way to play it.

author.name: Tut C🅰️pital
author.description: Critical and sarcastic thinker. Graduate from the school of life. Always learning. Never financial or investment advice.

kept.text:
$JOBY Aviation just made history, successfully completing New York City’s first point-to-point eVTOL air taxi demonstration flights.

The piloted aircraft flew from JFK Airport to multiple Manhattan heliports, completing trips in under 10 minutes vs. 60-120 minutes by car in traffic.

It’s exciting, but let’s see if it we can scale.

مستقبل التنقل بدأ رسمياً..  والبداية من مانهاتن! 🚁⚡️

طائرة Joby Aviation الكهربائية تحول الحلم إلى واقع في سماء نيويورك:
• من قلب مانهاتن إلى مطار JFK في 7 دقائق فقط! (انسوا الـ 60 دقيقة في التاكسي الأصفر 🚕).
• هدوء تام: صوتها يختفي وسط ضجيج المدينة، أهدأ من المروحيات التقليدية بـ 100 مرة.
 • بدون انبعاثات: طيران نظيف 100% وبطاقة كهربائية بالكامل.
• بالشراكة مع الكبار: قريباً تطلب "طيارتك" عبر تطبيق Uber وتطير مع Delta.

المستقبل ماراح يجي.. المستقبل هبط فعلياً في مهبط "داون تاون". جولة Electric Skies 2026 تفتتح عصر "التاكسي الطائر" تزامناً مع احتفالات أمريكا بذكراها الـ 250. 🇺🇸✨

kept.text:
🚨 Havacılıkta Devrim: $JOBY ile "Uçan Taksi" Dönemi Başlıyor!

Needham'ın $JOBY için 18 dolarlık hedef fiyatını koruması ve "eğer değil, ne zaman" vurgusu, eVTOL (elektrikli dikey kalkış ve iniş) teknolojisinin artık bir hayalden öteye geçtiğini kanıtlıyor. NYC’de JFK Havalimanı’ndan Blade’in merkezine yapılan gerçek uçuş gösterisi, Joby’nin rakipleriyle arasındaki liderlik farkını ve hibrit uçuş teknolojisindeki öncülüğünü bir kez daha tescilledi.
 Özellikle lüks gayrimenkul geliştiricileriyle yapılan "özel hava taksi erişimi" ortaklıkları, bu teknolojinin sadece bir ulaşım aracı değil, yeni nesil bir yaşam standardı haline geleceğini gösteriyor. Geleceğin gökyüzü rotaları bugün inşa ediliyor! 🚁⚡️

#JOBY #eVTOL #

tweet.text:
The future of aviation is coming way faster than you think! @jrouldz got this amazing footage - notice how quiet this $Joby EVTOL is! It’s so quiet in fact that it’s being overtaken by the noise pollution of a much more distant classical internal combustion engine helicopter. 

Joby Aviation's eVTOL aircraft operates at a noise level of 45.2 A-weighted decibels (dBA) when flying overhead at 500m. 

Helicopter operating noise typically ranges from 85 to over 100 decibels (dB) at close range (e.g., 100–500 ft).

The difference is remarkable. 

$JOBY $ACHR $HOVR
